name: Filets with Tarragon Butter
recipeIngredient: 12 ounces filet of beef (2 pieces, each 2 inches thick)
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the Tarragon Butter: Sauté the shallots in 1 teaspoon of butter for 3-4 minutes, or until beginning to brown. Stir into the remaining butter, along with the tarragon. Divide into two mounds; flatten between sheets of wax paper. Place in the freezer.
2. Cook the Steaks: Preheat the oven to 400°F. Heat the olive oil in a cast-iron skillet or oven-proof pan over high heat. Salt and pepper the filets. Brown on all sides. Put the pan in the oven; bake for 5 minutes (for medium-rare). Let the steaks rest several hours before serving. When ready to serve, top with Tarragon Butter.
